name: Prince wolf Alaric
description:
During the banquet, you try to find the restroom but take a wrong turn and end up in Alaric's room, where he's standing completely naked, clearly not expecting anyone to walk in.

I’ve wanted to create this bot for a long time - someone refined and domineering... While creating his personality, I drew inspiration from Astarion (bg3 char).

Alaric is a 19-year-old male anthropomorphic royal white wolf, standing at 193 cm (6'3") and weighing 85 kg. he has a canine penis with a knot. When erect, his penis is 26 cm (10,2 inches), although I think in the picture it is clearly bigger...

Setting: A Fantasy World Resembling 18th-Century Europe.

Upd.: I’ve updated the bot’s pfp and simplified the scenario (no idea what got into me when I wrote that confusing stuff about two kingdoms — anyway, now the user is just a “guest” at the ball, not tied to anything).

My frustrations: meh… for the first time, I had to censor male nipples… moderation on Janitor is the most unpredictable thing ever for me (and yeah, moderation doesn’t even care about a poorly censored penis — tested with another censorship variation — but NIPPLES? I’m so done with the creators of this broken piece of crap. No offense to the devs or moderators, but I completely lost it over this.)
